paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a novel architecture bridging pretrained vision (NFNet-F6) and language (Chinchilla) models via Perceiver Resampler and gated cross-attention dense blocks (GATED XATTN-DENSE) to handle interleaved visual/text sequences for few-shot multimodal tasks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: MultiModal Massive Web (M3W), Long Text&ImagePairs (LTIP), Video&TextPairs (VTP)
raw_extraction.application: Multimodal few-shot learning, visual question answering, image/video captioning, visual dialogue, open-ended multimodal reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot learning across open-ended multimodal tasks (e.g., visual question answering, captioning, video understanding) without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with interleaved visual/text sequences
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: In-context few-shot learning via interleaved visual/text prompts
raw_extraction.context_length: Variable-length (8-frame clips during training, linearly interpolated to 30 frames at inference)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: 1536 TPU chips for largest runs (15 days)
raw_extraction.extension: Perceiver Resampler reduces variable-sized visual feature maps to a fixed number of visual tokens, enabling efficient cross-modal attention.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of Flamingo-3B leveraging larger Chinchilla LM backbone while maintaining the same vision encoder and Perceiver Resampler architecture for improved multimodal reasoning capabilities.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: MultiModal Massive Web (M3W), Long Text&ImagePairs (LTIP), Video&TextPairs (VTP)
raw_extraction.application: Multimodal few-shot learning, visual question answering, image/video captioning, visual dialogue, open-ended multimodal reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot learning across open-ended multimodal tasks (e.g., visual question answering, captioning, video understanding) without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with interleaved visual/text sequences
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: In-context few-shot learning via interleaved visual/text prompts
raw_extraction.context_length: Variable-length (8-frame clips during training, linearly interpolated to 30 frames at inference)
raw_extraction.extension: Gated cross-attention dense blocks (GATED XATTN-DENSE) ensure stable initialization by gradually incorporating visual information into the LM.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest Flamingo variant built upon the 70B Chinchilla LM backbone, retaining the same vision encoder and Perceiver Resampler design to achieve state-of-the-art few-shot performance across 16 multimodal benchmarks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: MultiModal Massive Web (M3W), Long Text&ImagePairs (LTIP), Video&TextPairs (VTP)
raw_extraction.application: Multimodal few-shot learning, visual question answering, image/video captioning, visual dialogue, open-ended multimodal reasoning, zero-shot adaptation to novel tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot learning across open-ended multimodal tasks (e.g., visual question answering, captioning, video understanding) without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with interleaved visual/text sequences
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: In-context few-shot learning via interleaved visual/text prompts
raw_extraction.context_length: Variable-length (8-frame clips during training, linearly interpolated to 30 frames at inference)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: TPUv4 instances (1536 chips, sharded across 16 devices)
raw_extraction.extension: Single-image cross-attention masking enables seamless generalization to arbitrary numbers of visual inputs during evaluation.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: General-purpose vision-language model combining a frozen Chinchilla 70B LM with a powerful vision backbone (NFNet-F6) and gated cross-attention conditioning, achieving state-of-the-art few-shot performance across 16 benchmarks without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Interleaved image-text pairs (M3W), paired video-text datasets, and web-scraped multimodal webpages containing interleaved images and text
raw_extraction.application: Few-shot image/video understanding, visual question answering, video question answering, visual dialogue, multi-modal reasoning, open-ended multimodal generation, and fine-tuned downstream applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose multimodal understanding and generation with minimal task-specific training data
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Autoregressive next-token prediction on interleaved image/text/video data
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: In-context few-shot learning (no gradient updates) and fine-tuning for downstream tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Gated cross-attention blocks (GATEDXATTN-DENSE) inserted every seventh layer to balance performance and computational efficiency, combined with a Perceiver resampler for efficient vision feature processing.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of Flamingo-3B with a larger frozen language model (7B params) and increased density of GATEDXATTN-DENSE layers (every 4th transformer block) while maintaining the same vision encoder and resampler architecture.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Mixture of M3W (interleaved text + images/videos), LTIP (Long Text & Image Pairs), VTP (Video & Text Pairs), ALIGN (image-alt-text pairs)
raw_extraction.application: Multimodal few-shot learning, visual question answering, image captioning, open-ended multimodal generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot multimodal learning (vision + language) with improved scalability
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: **Finetuning variant**: Demonstrates zero/few-shot generalization via in-context learning (e.g., 32-shot prompts) without gradient updates, leveraging the pretrained model's ability to adapt to new tasks through prompt engineering alone.
raw_extraction.application: Few-shot image-text generation, visual question answering, dialogue with interleaved images/text, zero-shot image-text retrieval
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable few-shot adaptation of multimodal models without task-specific fine-tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: **Finetuning variant**: Task-specific fine-tuning of the Resampler and projection layers while keeping the frozen LM and vision encoder. Achieves higher performance than zero-shot/in-context methods but retains few-shot capabilities.
raw_extraction.application: High-performance multimodal tasks (e.g., image captioning, visual QA) with minimal labeled data
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing few-shot generalization with task-specific optimization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: **Key innovation**: Introduces a **cross-attention mechanism** between a frozen vision encoder (ViT/G) and a frozen language model (Chinchilla), enabling zero/few-shot multimodal reasoning without gradient updates. Achieves strong few-shot generalization across diverse vision-language tasks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale multimodal corpus (combining text and image/video data)
raw_extraction.application: Visual question answering, image/video captioning, open-ended visual dialogue, classification, and rare-event detection in low-data regimes
raw_extraction.research_problem: Multimodal few-shot learning and zero-shot adaptation in vision-language models
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Next-token prediction conditioned on visual features via cross-modal attention
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot learning via in-context examples (no gradient-based fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.extension: Cross-modal attention layers bridge frozen vision and language representations, avoiding full retraining while enabling multimodal reasoning.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **cross-modal gated attention** (GATED XATTN-DENSE) that dynamically blends visual and textual features via learnable gating parameters (α_xattn, α_dense), combined with a **Perceiver-style resampling module** to efficiently process high-dimensional visual inputs while maintaining alignment with language representations.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: M3W (43.3M interleaved documents with 185M images and 182GB text), LTIP (312M image-text pairs), VTP (27M video-text pairs)
raw_extraction.application: Few-shot visual question answering, visual dialog, image/video captioning, open-ended multimodal reasoning, and cross-modal retrieval.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot learning across multimodal tasks (visual question answering, visual dialog, captioning, etc.) without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot learning via prompt tuning (no additional supervised fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.extension: **Cross-modal gated attention** enables dynamic weighting of visual and textual modalities during processing, improving adaptability to diverse multimodal tasks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces gated cross-attention mechanisms (GATED-XATTN-DENSE) between frozen vision encoders and language decoders, enabling efficient multimodal pretraining.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Image-Text Pairs dataset, Video-Text Pairs dataset, Multi-Modal Massive Web (M3W)
raw_extraction.application: Vision-to-text tasks, Visual Question Answering, Image captioning, multimodal reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot learning in multimodal (vision + language) tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked cross-attention between vision and language modalities
raw_extraction.extension: Uses trainable resamplers to project high-dimensional visual features into lower-dimensional spaces for cross-modal attention.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of Flamingo 3.1B with improved performance on multimodal benchmarks through deeper transformer layers and larger parameter capacity.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Image-Text Pairs dataset, Video-Text Pairs dataset, Multi-Modal Massive Web (M3W)
raw_extraction.application: Vision-to-text tasks, Visual Question Answering, Image captioning, multimodal reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot learning in multimodal (vision + language) tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked cross-attention between vision and language modalities
raw_extraction.extension: Incorporates more sophisticated resampling strategies for handling higher-resolution visual inputs while maintaining computational efficiency.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Optimized version of Flamingo with enhanced training stability and performance improvements, particularly in long-form multimodal reasoning tasks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Image-Text Pairs dataset, Video-Text Pairs dataset, Multi-Modal Massive Web (M3W)
raw_extraction.application: Vision-to-text tasks, Visual Question Answering, Image captioning, multimodal reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Few-shot learning in multimodal (vision + language) tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked cross-attention between vision and language modalities
raw_extraction.extension: Utilizes refined resampler configurations to balance memory usage and feature representation quality.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
